历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 54949 → 53255 → 53716 → 130195 → 54059. In 2024, an abnormally high ranking occurred due to the Sino-foreign cooperative education project of Wellington College. In 2025, it returned to 54059. Fluctuations have been significant in recent two years, with the 2025 baseline around 54059. The provincial science/physics enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 2844 → 2965 → 2962 → 2578 → 3227 respectively. In 2026, the physics category plan is 2979, and the medical category plan is 1402, totaling 4381, a substantial increase of about 35.8% compared to 2025, which alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking steadily rose from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (rumors of cat abuse and other public opinion incidents), and in 2025, reputation was somewhat negative (admission score lines collapsed nationwide, with 389 points admitted in Heilongjiang). Douyin popularity ranks 8th (high heat). The label of the only 211 university for 100 million Henan people gives it extremely high exposure on short video platforms, with increasing attention for applications. Its traditional strengths include clinical medicine, materials science and engineering, and chemistry, which attract applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering remain highly popular in society, aligning well with the university's engineering offerings. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 907,000), intensifying competition. Zhengzhou University is located in Zhengzhou City, Henan Province, and is the only 211 university in the province. It enrolls a very high proportion of students from the province (in 2025, the physics category plan of 3227 accounted for the vast majority of national enrollment), with strong willingness among local examinees to apply, showing significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 54059, the alleviation of competition due to a substantial enrollment expansion of about 35.8% in 2026, the intensification of competition due to a 32% increase in provincial examinees, the somewhat negative reputation that may suppress some application enthusiasm, and the sustained high attention from Douyin heat, the expansion and increase in examinees roughly offset each other, but the somewhat negative reputation slightly outweighs. The minimum ranking is expected to shift slightly backward from 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 65859, with a range of 65359–66359.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 郑州大学是国家211工程重点建设高校、国家双一流建设高校，综合实力位居省内首位。医学学科是该校传统优势领域，拥有多家附属医院和临床学院，在河南省内具有极高的认 可度和影响力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是河南考生报考的热门方向，临床医学、口腔医学等专业竞争尤为激烈。郑州大学地处省会郑州，地域优势明显，本省医学类招生规模较大，2026年医学类总计 划达1402人，为考生提供了较多录取机会。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年继续扩招17.8%的供需弹性影响及近年位次剧烈波动趋势，预测2026年郑州大学医学类最低录取位次约为59939名，波动区间预计在59439至60439名之间。扩招持续但 增速放缓，位次较2025年继续小幅下降（数字增大）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Zhengzhou University's medical programs in Henan Province have fluctuated significantly over the past five years: 54,949 in 2021 (total plan 676), sharply rising to 27,613 in 2022 (plan 704), 28,881 in 2023 (plan 756), further rising to 22,963 in 2024 (plan 704), and sharply falling back to 54,059 in 2025 (plan expanded to 1,190). In 2026, the enrollment plan continues to expand to 1,402, an increase of 212 from 2025, an expansion rate of about 17.8%. Continuous expansion leads to a decline in the competition threshold, with ranking numbers showing an increasing trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a key national university under the 211 Project and a national Double First-Class construction university, with comprehensive strength ranking first in the province. The medical discipline is a traditional advantage area of the university, with multiple affiliated hospitals and clinical colleges, enjoying extremely high recognition and influence within Henan Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction for Henan examinees, with clinical medicine, stomatology, and other majors being particularly competitive. Zhengzhou University is located in the provincial capital Zhengzhou, with obvious regional advantages. The province's medical enrollment scale is relatively large, with a total plan of 1,402 for medical programs in 2026, providing many admission opportunities for examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the supply-demand elasticity impact of the continued 17.8% expansion in 2026 and the recent trend of drastic ranking fluctuations, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Zhengzhou University's medical programs in 2026 will be approximately 59,939, with a fluctuation range expected between 59,439 and 60,439. The expansion continues but the growth rate slows down, and the ranking will continue to slightly decline (number increases) compared to 2025.
